title: Shift from plain feature packet to delta-dominant packet after first smoke
question: Which packet route should continue after the first teacher-packet smoke on the frozen 4-frame surface?
reason: The first packet smoke does not support plain static feature packet as the machine-facing winner, because its retrieval top-1 stays at 0.25, matching the reconstructed-video control. The same smoke does support temporal-change signal as the promising route: delta-only packet retrieval reaches top-1 0.75 with mean rank 1.25, and a heavy delta-dominant concat mix also reaches top-1 0.75. The next justified iteration should therefore treat delta as the primary packet signal rather than continuing to center plain feature embeddings.

criteria: retrieval preservation against the same frozen 4-frame control
minimal extra complexity beyond the first exporter/evaluator scaffold
clean continuity with the parent reconstructed-video comparison
selection.why_winner: It is the smallest route that materially outperforms the reconstructed-video control on the first bounded smoke.

why_not_alternatives.plain_feature_packet: It fails to improve over the reconstructed-video control.
why_not_alternatives.heavy_delta_concat_packet: It matches delta-only performance on this smoke but adds mixing complexity without extra evidence yet.

selection.main_residual_risk: The current support is still bounded to a 4-frame smoke surface, so the next step must verify that delta-dominant behavior remains stable under the same comparison contract before scaling.

next_action: Prepare the smallest delta-first packet follow-up package on the same frozen 4-frame surface and reuse the current exporter/evaluator scaffold.
comment: Record the first teacher packet smoke decision and route shift toward a delta-dominant packet interface.

guidance_vm.summary: Decision accepted: use the latest measured result to start the next optimization round.

The same smoke does support temporal-change signal as the promising route: delta-only packet retrieval reaches top-1 0.75 with mean rank 1.25, and a heavy delta-dominant concat mix also reaches top-1 0.75. The next justified iteration should therefore treat delta as the primary packet signal rather than continuing to center plain feature embeddings.
complete_when: The latest main result is summarized durably against baseline.
A new idea branch is recorded with explicit reasons grounded in the measured result.

alternative_routes.label: Branch an alternative
alternative_routes.when: The current result is informative, but a sibling direction may now be stronger.
alternative_routes.tradeoff: Improves search breadth, but adds another durable branch.

alternative_routes.label: Analyze first
alternative_routes.when: The result is promising but still ambiguous.
alternative_routes.tradeoff: Improves understanding, but delays the next optimization round.
